subject: Match Template
body:
Hi Dimitry,
    It looks like that "Match Template" is the function to load a volume 
and boxout particles based on projections accordingly, is that true?
    However the options are some what confused, for example, use ??% of 
template / store ??? best results.
    And, i try playing it with several different numbers, however i got 
crashed afterwards.
   Can you explain a little bit how to use it?
   Thanks in advance,
   Best,
X
